name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a feature for PinkBrain Router
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

One-sentence description of the feature.

## Problem

What problem does this solve? Who benefits?

## Proposed Solution

How should it work?

## Affected Components

- [ ] Engine (state machine / pipeline)
- [ ] OpenRouter Client (key management / credits)
- [ ] Bags Client (fee claiming / swaps)
- [ ] Distribution Service (holder snapshots / allocation)
- [ ] REST API
- [ ] Dashboard UI
- [ ] CLI
- [ ] Documentation

## Alternatives Considered

Any other approaches you considered and why this one is better.

## Additional Context

Screenshots, mockups, links to related issues or PRDs.
